name: Benny Raphael Taylor
researcher_question: Who were the parents of Benny Raphael Taylor (born 1921 in McCammon, Bannock, Idaho; died 1991 in Tillamook, Oregon)?
notes: Parents are Silvester Jay Taylor (KW8G-33L, b. 29 May 1877 Fairview, Franklin, Idaho; d. 10 Mar 1944 Garibaldi, Tillamook, Oregon) and Autossie Ann Bair (KWZ8-3RD, b. 21 May 1883 Richmond, Cache, Utah; d. 24 Nov 1962 Winnemucca, Humboldt, Nevada), married 21 Oct 1901 in Logan, Cache, Utah. The family migrated from McCammon, Idaho to Garibaldi, Oregon c.1925-26; the 1930 and 1940 US censuses enumerate Benny ('Bennie') in the household of his father Jay Taylor, and the SSA NUMIDENT/obituary corroborate. Distinctive given names (Autossie, Silvester) keep namespace-confusion risk low. NOTE: both of Benny's wives were stripped alongside the parents because the FamilySearch relatives-expansion reused duplicate fact GUIDs carried by the spouse records, which the strip tool rejects; Benny's two children remain attached to him as starting context.
